_comment: KNOWLEDGE BASE. Authored and edited offline. The deterministic engine fires these at runtime. No euro figures here — prices come from the catalogue. Percentages are RD 1098/2001 reference values, overridable per project.

concepto_to_price._doc: Knowledge: which price code in the catalogue resolves a given partida concept. Engine looks up by concepto string.

duracion_capitulo_dias._doc: Reference work-plan durations per chapter (working days). Engine treats these as defaults; a real project overrides via project-param.

rules.name: MAP_demolicion_tabique
rules._doc: Demolishing a tabique implies a demolition partida.

rules.name: MAP_tabique_a_partidas
rules._doc: A new tabique in the memoria generates the albañilería partida.

rules.name: MAP_enlucido
rules._doc: Plastering item in the memoria → revestimientos partida.

rules.name: REG_licencia_requerida
rules._doc: LUIB 12/2017 art.146 + LOE 38/1999: a work that needs a technical project requires prior municipal licence.

data.mensaje: Obra sujeta a licencia urbanística municipal previa (LUIB art.146). Anexos obligatorios: Estudio de Seguridad y Salud (RD 1627/1997), Plan de gestión de RCD (RD 105/2008), Plan de control de calidad CTE y plan de obra.

rules.name: REG_rustico_riesgo
rules._doc: Rural land in Ibiza is high-risk. The rule only raises a flag; it never asserts legality.

data.mensaje: Suelo rústico en Ibiza: requiere revisión técnica/jurídica previa (Ley 7/2024, regímenes de legalización). No presupuestar sin verificar el régimen aplicable.

rules.name: REG_iva_reducido
rules._doc: Reduced 10% IVA only applies to primary residence (Ley 37/1992 art.91.uno.2). Remind the technician to verify eligibility.

data.mensaje: IVA reducido del 10% aplicado por uso vivienda habitual (Ley 37/1992 art.91.uno.2). Verificar que el proyecto cumple los requisitos.
